tr.th: Patient appears able to understand information provided to them on proposed treatments
Patient appears able to understand the consequences of their decisions

tr.td: Medical history notes line 1 Medical history notes line 2 Medical history notes line 3
Per asthma leaflet Recommend ask Housing NZ to remove privet bush
Pt states stressors at home which seem to precipitate asthma attacks Also note flowering privet bush outside front door see photo
